跳过导航链接
  • 程序包
  • 类
  • 树
  • 索引
  • 帮助
SEARCH

所有类和接口

类
说明
Entrant
Model class representing a single entrant record stored in an event waitlist.
EntrantAdapter
RecyclerView adapter used to display entrants in the organizer waitlist screen.
EntrantListActivity
Organizer screen for viewing entrants who joined a specific event waitlist.
EntrantListActivityIntentTest
Control tests for EntrantListActivity.
EntrantListActivityTest
Espresso tests for viewing and filtering entrants in the waiting list.
EntrantModelTest
Unit tests for the Entrant model class.
Event
Model class representing an event owned by an organizer.
EventAdapter
RecyclerView adapter for displaying events on the organizer dashboard.
EventModelTest
Unit tests for the Event model class.
ExampleInstrumentedTest
Instrumented test, which will execute on an Android device.
ExampleUnitTest
Example local unit test, which will execute on the development machine (host).
ManageEventActivity
Organizer screen for managing a specific event.
ManageEventActivityIntentTest
Intent tests for ManageEventActivity.
ManageEventActivityUpdatePosterTest
Espresso test for update poster button state.
ManageEventActivityUploadPosterTest
Espresso test for upload poster button state.
OnEventClickListener
Listener interface for organizer event card actions.
OrganizerDashboardActivity
Organizer dashboard screen that displays summary statistics and event cards.
OrganizerDashboardIntentTest
Intent tests for OrganizerDashboardActivity.
WaitlistMapActivity
Organizer screen that displays a map of where entrants joined an event waitlist.
WaitlistMapActivityIntentTest
Control tests for WaitlistMapActivity.
WaitlistMapActivityTest
Espresso tests for the waitlist map screen.
